ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location within the ISA specification */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Main feature being tested */,
  "sub_feature" TEXT /* Sub feature or specific aspect of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "verification_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the verification process */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties related to the requirement */,
  "pass_fail_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for passing or failing the verification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of verification method used */,
  "coverage_method" TEXT /* Method used for coverage */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details of the coverage approach */,
  "link_to_coverage" TEXT /* Link to the documentation or evidence of coverage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the requirement */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the requirement */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the requirement */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was last updated */,
  "related_documents" TEXT /* Link to related documents or specifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification result */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement being verified */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the verification was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the verification (Pass/Fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the verification */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* User who performed the verification */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method used for verification */,
  "environment_details" TEXT /* Details about the testing environment */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a retest is required */,
  "retest_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for a retest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_results_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_data" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage data entry */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of coverage achieved */,
  "coverage_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the coverage */,
  "coverage_source" TEXT /* Source of the coverage data */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* User who verified the coverage */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coverage was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_data_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectural_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architectural state */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement related to the state */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the architectural state */,
  "state_change_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the state changes */,
  "state_type" TEXT /* Type of state */,
  "initial_value" TEXT /* Initial value of the state */,
  "final_value" TEXT /* Final value of the state after the test */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* User who verified the state */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_architectural_states_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement for which the test case is developed */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_steps" TEXT /* Steps to execute the test case */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of test case */,
  "test_case_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case */,
  "test_case_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the test case */,
  "test_case_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test case */,
  "test_case_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or observations */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test case */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the verification process */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
